_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: Representative Western blots showing neurofibromin expression in response to VEGF (25 ng/mL) in subconfluent and confluent ECFC and HMVEC
